messages.content: How do you say "I think" in Mandarin Chinese?
The phrase "I think" in Mandarin Chinese is: "我觉得" (wǒ juéde).
How do you say "I might" in Mandarin Chinese?
"I might" in Mandarin Chinese can be translated as "我可能" (wǒ kěnéng).
What is the Mandarin Chinese word for "to vomit"?
The Mandarin Chinese word for "to vomit" is "呕吐" (ǒutù).
What is the Mandarin Chinese word for "of"?
The Mandarin Chinese word for "of" is "的" (de). It is often used to indicate possession or to form adjectival phrases.
What is the Mandarin Chinese word for "hotel"?
The Mandarin Chinese word for "hotel" is "酒店" (jiǔdiàn).
What is the Mandarin Chinese word for "crystal"?
The Mandarin Chinese word for "crystal" is "水晶" (shuǐjīng).
What is the Mandarin Chinese word for "relics"?
The Mandarin Chinese word for "relics" is "文物" (wénwù).
What is the Mandarin Chinese word for "illicit"?
The Mandarin Chinese word for "illicit" is "非法的" (fēifǎ de).
"empire"
The Mandarin Chinese word for "empire" is "帝国" (dìguó).
"fallen"
The Mandarin Chinese word for "fallen" is "倒下的" (dǎoxià de) or "垮掉的" (kuǎdiào de), depending on the context.
"fallen" as in dead
The Mandarin Chinese word for "fallen" in the context of being dead is "陨落的" (yǔnluò de).
"stardust"
The Mandarin Chinese word for "stardust" is "星尘" (xīngchén).
What is the Mandarin Chinese word for "advanced"?
The Mandarin Chinese word for "advanced" is "先进的" (xiānjìn de).
"plaque" like on a tooth
The Mandarin Chinese word for "plaque" on a tooth is "牙菌斑" (yá jūnbān).
"decay"
The Mandarin Chinese word for "decay" is "腐烂" (fǔlàn).
